name: RaspAP
description: RaspAP is a feature-rich wireless router software for Debian-based devices. It lets you create a WiFi access point, manage hostapd, dnsmasq, OpenVPN, WireGuard and more through a clean web interface.
short_desc: Wireless access point and router manager.
author: RaspAP

form_fields.label: SSID Name
form_fields.hint: Name of the WiFi access point

form_fields.label: SSID Password
form_fields.hint: Password for the WiFi access point (min. 8 characters)

form_fields.label: Web GUI Username
form_fields.hint: Admin username for the RaspAP web interface

form_fields.label: Web GUI Password
form_fields.hint: Admin password for the RaspAP web interface
